hero.hero_overview: Silvanna is a powerful fighter mage who excels in the Exp Lane or as a Roamer Her ability to lock down enemies with her Imperial Justice ultimate makes her a top tier pick for team fights and pick off strategies She can deal massive magic damage while sustaining herself with life steal
hero.hero_strength: Strong crowd control, high life steal from skills, and excellent 1v1 dueling potential with her ultimate.
hero.hero_weakness: Weak against hard CC, skills can be canceled easily, and she is vulnerable if she misses her second skill.

dominants.dominant_desc: First, you must know the enemy's positions and prepare an advanced position for yourself to backdoor or initiate a teamfight. You'll be the assasin for your team to kill squishy heroes, so your team have the great advantage. If there's no team fight, prepare yourself while gaining gold after 5 mins. But before that, you must level up to 2 and go to the nearest side lane for first blood(don't be scared of wasting your spell).

emblems.emblem_desc: Lethal Ignition helps for burn damage, if you can't execute them quickly(finisher). Bargain Hunter for faster building, because you'll be the backup DMG Dealer for your team, to counter the opponent's DD like marksman or mage. Inspire for extra cooldown reduction, gaining shield and crowd control skills more often.

equips.equip_desc: This build will give you extra damage on skill 2 because of the feather of heaven, genius wand of mid game penetration, concentrated energy for lifesteal combined with winter crown after using second skill(don't forget to apply cc on the enemy) and holy crystal for late game damage. we used dire hit penetration boots for extra damage. [SITUATIONAL: Use divine glaive instead of genius want in the late game if there's 3 or more tanky heroes(magic defense)].

hero.hero_overview: Silvanna is a fighter hero that uses magic damage, including her basic attack. This may be a lil bit crazy for a guide but this is really effective for rank matches as they don't exactly know the purpose of this.
hero.hero_strength: Since she uses magic damage, it's better to build a magic core build to maximize her abilities, especially for team fights. She is very strong against low-mid tanky heroes, especially damage dealers. On top of that, she is very easy to use as you only do the simple combo and an additional item for survivability. That's not all of that, she is also very overpowered in early matches, because of her skills to instantly execute the enemy with a specific spell.
hero.hero_weakness: She is kind of squishy, if not used correctly. The worse part is if you have low game sense, this may affect the effectiveness of the guide.

Specialties: Initiator, Crowd Control

hero.hero_strength:
Excellent crowd control and lockdown.

Scales well with hybrid items (magic and defense).

Strong 1v1 potential.

Good initiator and zone control with her ultimate.

Vulnerable to burst damage if she misses her combo.

Requires good timing and positioning.

Needs some items to be truly tanky.
